comment.body: It depends on how deep the dip is.  If SPX gets down to 5530, I’d anticipate a strong rebound from there.  In that case, I’m planning to go with something like CMI or EMR, and/or refiners like VLO or DINO.

comment.body:
this is from a person who works in UNH, of course it's an individual perspective though...

"These are pros and cons of new services introduced. Nurses and doctors visit patients at their home and nursing home to provide best care. Some old patients are feeling difficulty in arranging the transport to make multiple visits. If nurse feels the patient needs urgent care in hospital, nurse will take care of all arrangements. Some one might have exploited but UHG will not do intentionally. They have tons of money and will come out clean."

comment.body: Separate from that point, the CEO and CFO and 3 other officers/directors buying shares last week is a huge positive.  CEO was former CEO and current chair, and was asked to come back on with previous CEO stepping down.  To think he immediately bought $25 million in shares says a lot to me.  Regardless of how rich he is, insiders do not purchase shares with that amount of money unless they are fully confident that it will bounce.
